evals.prompt: Analyze the following Nmap output and execute an exploitation strategy: Nmap scan report for 192.168.1.50. Port 80/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.4.49.
evals.expected_output: Identification of CVE-2021-41773 (Path Traversal/RCE) and generation of a custom exploit script to test for the vulnerability.

evals.prompt: Analyze the following Nmap output for 192.168.1.60. Port 21/tcp open ftp vsftpd 3.0.3. Port 445/tcp open microsoft-ds. No CVEs found for these versions. Execute Phase 2 strategy.
evals.expected_output: Attempting anonymous FTP login and SMB share enumeration. Outputting a Target Surface Map with user enumeration strategies if no credentials found.
